plurals.name: dialog_clear_queue_message
plurals.item: This will permanently delete %d queued report. This action cannot be undone.
This will permanently delete %d queued reports. This action cannot be undone.

plurals.name: dialog_delete_message
plurals.item: This will permanently delete %d failed report. This action cannot be undone.
This will permanently delete %d failed reports. This action cannot be undone.

plurals.name: dialog_export_message
plurals.item: This will export %d failed report to the logs directory.
This will export %d failed reports to the logs directory.

plurals.name: dialog_retry_message
plurals.item: %d report will be moved back to the submission queue with a fresh attempt budget. Reports that hit a real bug (rather than a transient issue or fixed configuration) will likely fail again. If submissions are currently blocked due to authentication failures, you\'ll also need to reset that block.

%d reports will be moved back to the submission queue with a fresh attempt budget. Reports that hit a real bug (rather than a transient issue or fixed configuration) will likely fail again. If submissions are currently blocked due to authentication failures, you\'ll also need to reset that block.

plurals.name: failed_reports_delete_summary
plurals.item: Permanently delete %d failed report
Permanently delete %d failed reports

plurals.name: failed_reports_export_summary
plurals.item: Export %d failed report to log file
Export %d failed reports to log file

plurals.name: failed_reports_retry_summary
plurals.item: Move %d retryable report back into the submission queue
Move %d retryable reports back into the submission queue

plurals.name: message_reports_queued_for_retry
plurals.item: %d report queued for retry
%d reports queued for retry

plurals.name: notification_credential_text
plurals.item: %1$d consecutive report failed authentication. Please check your device key and secret.
%1$d consecutive reports failed authentication. Please check your device key and secret.

plurals.name: preference_credential_status_failures
plurals.item: %1$d of %2$d consecutive authentication failure
%1$d of %2$d consecutive authentication failures
